title: Mid-America Apartment Communities: Reasons To Stay Long, But Be Cautious
text: MAA has been a strong performer, benefiting from the renewed interest in REITs, as well as strong rental pricing in the Southeast and Mid-Atlantic regions of the country. REITs in general have a strong history during inflationary periods. MAA in particular has been beating the market for a while. This makes it a good hold, in my view.
